# netbox_custom_object_type_field (Resource)

Manages a field on a NetBox Custom Object Type, provided by the [netbox-custom-objects](https://github.com/netbox-community/netbox-custom-objects) plugin. Fields define the individual attributes (text, integer, object reference, etc.) available on instances of a Custom Object Type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "netbox_custom_object_type" "example" {
  name = "server_role"
  slug = "server-role"
}

resource "netbox_custom_object_type_field" "label" {
  custom_object_type_id = netbox_custom_object_type.example.id
  description           = "Short human-readable label for the role."
  filter_logic          = "loose"
  label                 = "Label"
  name                  = "label"
  primary               = true
  required              = true
  type                  = "text"
  ui_editable           = "yes"
  ui_visible            = "always"
  unique                = true
}

resource "netbox_custom_object_type_field" "owner" {
  custom_object_type_id     = netbox_custom_object_type.example.id
  label                     = "Owner"
  name                      = "owner"
  on_delete_behavior        = "set_null"
  related_name              = "server_role_owner"
  related_object_type_input = "tenancy.tenant"
  type                      = "object"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `custom_object_type_id` (Number) Numeric ID of the Custom Object Type this field belongs to. Changing this forces a new field to be created.
- `name` (String) Internal field name. Must match `^[a-z0-9]+(_[a-z0-9]+)*$` (lowercase alphanumerics separated by underscores). Maximum 50 characters. Changing this forces a new field to be created.
- `type` (String) Data type of the field. One of `text`, `longtext`, `integer`, `decimal`, `boolean`, `date`, `datetime`, `url`, `json`, `select`, `multiselect`, `object`, `multiobject`. Changing this forces a new field to be created.

### Optional

- `choice_set_id` (Number) Numeric ID of a NetBox custom field choice set (used with `select` and `multiselect` fields).
- `comments` (String) Free-form comments on the field.
- `context` (Boolean) If true, this field's value is shown as context when the object is referenced by other objects.
- `default` (String) Default value for the field, encoded as a JSON string. For example: `"foo"`, `42`, `true`, or `["a","b"]`. The provider normalizes the JSON to a compact form, so equivalent formatting variants will not produce spurious diffs.
- `deprecated` (Boolean) If true, the field is marked deprecated: it remains in the database but becomes read-only in the UI.
- `deprecated_since` (String) Schema version in which this field was marked deprecated. Maximum 50 characters.
- `description` (String) Free-form description of the field. Maximum 200 characters.
- `filter_logic` (String) Filter matching mode. One of `disabled`, `loose`, `exact`.
- `group_name` (String) Group label used to cluster fields together in the UI. Maximum 50 characters.
- `is_cloneable` (Boolean) If true, the field's value is replicated when cloning objects.
- `is_polymorphic` (Boolean) If true, this object-typed field references multiple types (a generic foreign key). Use `related_object_types_input` to list them.
- `label` (String) Human-readable label shown in the NetBox UI. Defaults to `name` if omitted. Maximum 50 characters.
- `on_delete_behavior` (String) Behavior when the referenced object is deleted (object fields only). One of `set_null`, `cascade`, `protect`, or an empty string.
- `primary` (Boolean) If true, this field's value is used as the object's display name.
- `related_name` (String) Reverse relation accessor name for `object`/`multiobject` fields. Must match `^[a-z0-9_]+$`. Maximum 100 characters.
- `related_object_filter` (String) Filter applied to the object selection choices, encoded as a JSON object (`query_params` dict). For example: `{"status":"active"}`. The provider normalizes the JSON to a compact form.
- `related_object_type_input` (String) Dotted `app_label.model` of the referenced object type for non-polymorphic `object`/`multiobject` fields (write-only). Split by the provider into the API's `app_label` and `model` inputs.
- `related_object_types_input` (Set of String) Set of dotted `app_label.model` values for polymorphic references (write-only). Each entry is sent to the API as `{app_label, model}`.
- `required` (Boolean) If true, this field must be set when creating or editing an object.
- `scheduled_removal` (String) Schema version in which this field is planned to be removed. Maximum 50 characters.
- `search_weight` (Number) Search weight for the field. Lower values rank higher; `0` disables the field for search. Range 0-32767.
- `ui_editable` (String) Controls whether the field value can be edited in the UI. One of `yes`, `no`, `hidden`.
- `ui_visible` (String) Controls whether the field is displayed in the UI. One of `always`, `if-set`, `hidden`.
- `unique` (Boolean) If true, values of this field must be unique across all instances of the parent Custom Object Type.
- `validation_maximum` (Number) Maximum allowed value for numeric fields.
- `validation_minimum` (Number) Minimum allowed value for numeric fields.
- `validation_regex` (String) Regular expression enforced on text field values. Maximum 500 characters.
- `weight` (Number) Display weight; higher weights appear lower in forms. Range 0-32767.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier of the Custom Object Type Field in NetBox.
- `related_object_type` (String) Dotted `app_label.model` of the referenced object type (for non-polymorphic `object`/`multiobject` fields), as reported by NetBox.
- `related_object_types` (String) Comma-separated list of dotted `app_label.model` values for polymorphic references, as reported by NetBox.
- `schema_id` (Number) Stable numeric identifier for this field used during schema diffing. Assigned by NetBox on creation.
- `url` (String) API URL of this Custom Object Type Field as reported by NetBox.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
#!/bin/sh
# Custom Object Type Fields are imported by their numeric NetBox ID.
terraform import netbox_custom_object_type_field.example 42
```
